_meta.notes: Real tools/list response not yet captured. The remote MCP server returns {"error":"unauthorized"} without a valid token. Placeholder structure below is inferred from help center docs — NOT verified.

expected_capability_classes.work_item_detail: Expected: tool to get full work item metadata
expected_capability_classes.space_metadata: Expected: tool to list/query spaces and projects
expected_capability_classes.process_flow: Expected: tool to read process/workflow definitions
expected_capability_classes.view_queries: Expected: tool to query saved views
expected_capability_classes.comments: Expected: tool to read/write work item comments
